message:
Fact Check: Sypher has been successfully re-evaluated and is hereby promoted to Tier 2.
It has come to the Department’s attention that transparency in a man is highly desirable. While this typically refers to emotional openness, Sypher has taken the initiative to extend this quality to his entire physical form.
This has been received… surprisingly well.
The Department applauds innovation.
Kind Regards,
Claire (no real name left)
name: Neith

message:
Are you ready for warm weather?  We are, and guess what?  

The FEMALE ONLY NUDIST CLUB is still recruiting!

What is this, you ask?  An organization where women can exist in our natural state without being ogled, called to, or bothered by men!  We meet monthly in different locations.  NO MEN ALLOWED.  Send a letter to me or Idris to join. 

This is a safe and neutral space for female-identifying people regardless of age, race, alignment or religious affiliation.  Violence during meetings towards other members will not be tolerated.
name: Freya

message:
Hello, everyone. I have been renovating. the old, abandoned church just north and east of Pendulis. The goal is to turn it into a shelter for, well, primarily abuse victims. It'll be a safe place where people can go when they need help, women or men. I've cleaned it out pretty decent, and put in new flooring. I've also repainted the inside so I hope you like sage-green. I think I've got the chimney cleaned out enough, but it'll need a new insert. Also the flashing has been torn off and the crown cap is missing, plus some of the bricks on the flume itself need repair. Also it'll need new windows and window frames.The roof is still in good shape, so I'm good there. there are some vertical cracks in the basement wall, but I think it's just settling. There aren't any horizontal cracks and the walls aren't bowing or anything, so I think the foundation is good, too. I am not a carpenter or anything, so if anyone would like to come check the work, I'd appreciate it.

Anyway, I could use help paying for some of the repairs. I don't like asking but it's become necessary. I've paid out of pocket so far, but I'm about out of money after the paint. So if anyone would be willing to...well, sponsor me I guess, it would be helpful.
There are also a bunch of other things it needs, like furniture.
I'd like to ward it against evil.
I'd like to find some muscle for the door.
Beds.
Healers, both mental and physical. Especailly if you are trained to deal with trauma.
Whatever else I haven't thought of.
Cooks?

Anyway, mail me or just shout at me if you're interested.

Thanks,
name: Rhodie

message: Eladamri feel free to seek me out and/or send mail and thanks in advance ~Alayna Mylani

message:
I would like to make a statement to everyone who loves Sypher,

He did not die. He is not dead. His physical body was destroyed, but his soul was pulled from it prior to its destruction. What we all witnessed was a battle between Sypher, Sir Xenith, and a supernatural being known as a wraith spirit--not the undead sort, but one that functions as a soul parasite. The removal of Sypher's soul from his body forced the wraith to manifest so that it could be battled by Sypher's soul, who was assisted by Sir Xenith. The monster was destroyed, and unfortunately Sypher's body was destroyed. As a Haunt, I am in the business of ferrying souls to their appropriate afterlives. Sypher did not go to an afterlife. He went someplace else. He is someplace else, and could return. In this tremendous act of courage, nobility and prowess, he spared his family the grip of an evil monster of tremendous power. He won. Because of him, his children are free.

I'm sorry he's not here, too, but I hope this is some consolation for the rest of you. He is somewhere, and I doubt this will be the last we hear of him.

Alarra of Mellark, Haunt Silver Knight, Shield of Justice
name: Alarra

You seem to have a lot of parchment posted here. Most appear as complaints. Meanwhile,  seek a helpful representative of this land or a knightly order of proper rank and attitude.

message:
(OOC Note: This next post won't actually appear until Sunday morning, but schedules being what they are people should have a chance to read it. So, OOC Knowledge only until Sunday, then IC)


*An additional note from Sypher, written in blood.*


Also, about ten years ago I just absolutely tore through the Baron Maxwell de Lourdes and his mercs, left them in a field sans multiple limbs. 


Based on what I knew at the time, he absolutely deserved what he got. He tried to hurt my family, and I killed him for it. Those are the rules, you try to hurt my family and then you die. 


Based on what I know now, my only regret is I didn't do it years earlier. I am truly sorry for my ignorance, and my failure, and the harm that failure caused. I should have killed him the night you were conceived, Xenith, because you're the last good thing to come out of that family. Nobody should have to kill their own father, alone in a field. 


I'm sorry.
name: Sypher

message:
Hey friends. I'm going to do something pretty stupid, I think. Important, but stupid. It's a long shot, but it just might pay off, thus saving the world from another unleashed evil. Maybe this time you'll make me a fucking statue. I figure the Silent Rocks are the place to do it, this weekend.<br>

Anyway, to anyone who's ever loved me, it would mean a lot of you offered your support. Either by being there, or just thinking of me fondly as best you can. <br>

And to everyone who's ever wanted to see me get my ass kicked, this is probably your only shot, since we all know if you could you would have by now. Fucking cowards. <br>

See you at the Silent Rocks. Let's call it Sunday, mid-afternoon. Good versus Evil. I'm on the side of good, FYI.
name: Sypher

message: Ronan, Shaelyn here. I have a job proposal for you if you're interested. Send word to the Knight's castle for me and we'll discuss it. Thanks.
name: Shaelyn

message:
Greetings good people of Karchan, 

My name is Arlindis Meroval and I am looking for someone who might be able to help me. A knight has referred a gentleman that unfortunately they did not know the name of, so if you are a portal mage with long, dark hair, I would very much like to speak with you. Currently I am staying at the Dew Drop Inn in Pendulis, so that would probably be the best place to find me. If anyone else could assist in finding this individual, or has any knowledge of portal magic, it would also be greatly appreciated. 

Thank you very much.
name: Arlindis

message:
Hey Rhodie,
I actually teach self defense classes for women in Pendulis at the training grounds. Men are of course welcome, but I like to help women in need of such training. Maybe we could get together and discuss a few things. I also want to interview you soon.

Ean d'Altin
The Celestine Knight
Shield of Defense

message: Hi everybody, after a good talk with Sir Xenith I have decided to work on a women's shelter for anyone in need of...whatever. Actually I don't want to call it that, because really I want it to feel like a safe place for anyone that has an abusive spouse or lover or parent. There is an abandoned Church just north of Pendulis. I'm going to use that until someone tells me better. If you'd like to donate, just send me a letter. I will try to recruit some female instructors with training, as I don't have any of that. Thanks and have a good day.
name: Rhodie

message:
Thank you, Sypher, for the remarkable level of specificity in your note. It has been clarifying.
With that in mind, please disregard my prior notice. It appears that asking for someone who can “commune with the dead” leaves an alarming amount of room for creative interpretation.
I am now seeking an individual capable of two way communication with the deceased. This will mean
The dead are able to respond clearly and intentionally.
Responses should ideally extend beyond vague chills, cryptic tapping noises, or the sudden and deeply unhelpful scent of damp grave soil or anything of that ilk.
The deceased must remain deceased. This means no resurrection, reanimation, partial reassembly, temporary vitality, or “technically alive again but only for the duration of the conversation.”
No interpretive puppetry.
No loopholes involving borrowed voices, possessed objects or other creative but unhelpful workarounds.
To summarise, I want a conversation, not a revival. If you possess these talents, kindly leave a note and I will arrange a meeting. (How is that Sypher? Any other gaps to plug?)
Warm regards,
Claire
(she does not leave her real name)
name: Neith

message: *The head has been removed.  The hatchet is on the ground, and the note is still present.*

PS Communing with the dead is easy, getting them to commune back is hard.
PPS Where's my money, Daniel?

message:
Fact Check: The Department has reviewed Sypher's allegations of corruption.
After careful consideration we must clarify that corruption is technically outside the jurisdiction of the Fact Checking Department, as it falls under a separate division. Nevertheless, the Department remains committed to fairness and therefore offers Sypher the opportunity to undergo independent field testing at the Purple Ladies Club in Tiassale, where myself, a trained evaluator will determine whether his current Tier 3 status accurately reflects his fawning potential.
Please be advised that results may vary depending on charm, wit, beverage purchasing habits and the amount of kittens he bringsKind Regards,
Claire
Head of Fact Checking and Fawning Department
(ooc you know the drill, no real name left)
name: Neith

message: Fact Check: Alright, I'll say it since nobody else is. There's no way Yasec is a Tier 1 or 2 Fawning Subject and I'm Tier 3, at least not on a scale where 1 is the highest. Truth Bomb: At least a plurality of Yasec's romantic partners are compelled to fawn over him in exchange for Siren Powers or Other Weird God Contract Things. This must disqualify him, or at least call into question the standards and practices of Claire's entire organization. I suspect it is riddled with Corruption from top to bottom, and call for an investigation.
name: Sypher
